text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 29 

MDCR_RX_PYMT_PLAN_IND 

LABEL: Medicare Prescription Payment Plan (MPPP) Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the PDE was included in the Medicare Prescription Payment Plan. 

SHORT NAME: MDCR_RX_PYMT_PLAN_IND 

LONG NAME: MDCR_RX_PYMT_PLAN_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Y = PDE is included in the Medicare Prescription
